caption: A man wearing a black t-shirt, a black baseball cap, and over-ear headphones sits in a studio setting. He wears a gold chain around his neck and a watch on his left wrist. He is positioned behind a professional microphone, with his hands clasped in front of him. The background is a white wall featuring a pattern of gold stars and the repeated text "ENFORCE HUSTLE." To his right, a logo reads "BOSS TALK 101" with a smaller line beneath it stating "BY L.O.V.E." A separate graphic on the left displays "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST." Throughout the sequence, the man remains in the same position, shifting his facial expression from a closed-eyed, smiling look to an open-eyed, attentive expression while slightly adjusting his head position. The lighting remains consistent, and the camera angle is a static medium shot.
